landing.headline: Glottos Matrix
landing.motto: 5% understanding the rule. 95% training your mouth.
landing.mottoLine2: Language is a sport. Open your mouth and speak.

courseSelection.heading: Choose a course
courseSelection.none: No courses available for this language pair yet.

courseHome.previewBanner: Course in progress: Lesson 1 is available, the rest are being authored.
courseHome.introSubtitle: How this course works — read before Lesson 1.

courseUnavailable.title: {course} — coming soon
courseUnavailable.message: This course isn't available in your language yet ({native}). We're working on it.
courseUnavailable.otherCourses: See other courses for this target

verdict.warningCaseAndPunctuation: Accepted, but watch capitalization and punctuation.

lesson.signInRequired: Sign in to unlock this part of the lesson. Free, and your progress syncs across devices.

vocab.title: Lesson vocabulary
vocab.openInGlottosTooltip: Opens the lesson vocab in the external app — flashcards with audio, search, and notes.

writing.intro: Read the task, type your answer {target}, and hit Check. Each answer is checked locally first; tricky cases ask Claude for a hint. Progress saves automatically.
writing.noExercises: No writing exercises in this lesson.
writing.openEndedNote: Open-ended drill — no automatic check. Say the answers aloud, then move on.
writing.openInGlottosTooltip: Opens the exercise answers in the external app — study with audio and word-by-word breakdown.

moreExercises.intro: Need more practice? Claude will generate a fresh 10-prompt exercise from this lesson's vocab and theme.
moreExercises.confirmDelete: Delete this generated exercise and all answers to it?

openEndedSample.heading: Listen and self-check
openEndedSample.empty: No sample available for this exercise.
openEndedSample.error: Couldn't generate the sample. Try again.

audio.listeningSubtitle: Three text variants per lesson. Open in glottos.com for synchronized audio playback.
audio.openInGlottosTooltip: Opens this text in the external app — listen with sync and tap-to-translate.
audio.glottosNote: Audio playback is handled by glottos.com — opens in a new tab.
audio.mouthSubtitle: Core principle: 95% mouth training. Read each line aloud. Don't just look — speak.
audio.emptyState: No scales or matrices in this lesson yet — they start from Lesson 3. Use the listening texts above for speaking practice.

dashboard.title: Your progress
dashboard.subtitle: Sign in to save progress to your account and pick up on any device. Without sign-in, it stays only in this browser.

settings.title: Settings
settings.nativeLangSubtitle: The language you speak — selects course content and UI translations.
settings.targetLangSubtitle: What you're learning. Cards show every language and its readiness.
settings.notAvailableForTarget: Not yet available for this target language
settings.progressSubtitle: Sign in to save progress to your account and access it from any device. Reset is destructive.
settings.themeSubtitle: Pick a colour scheme. System follows your device.

dictionary.title: German course dictionary
dictionary.searchPlaceholder: Search for a word {target} or in English… (press / to focus)
dictionary.pickLetterOrSearch: Pick a letter or type a word to search.

details.error: Could not load details. Try again.
details.notFound: "{word}" doesn't look like a real word.

cefr.completedNone: Your bar will start filling as soon as you mark your first lesson complete.
cefr.lessonContributionIntro: Completing this lesson will add to your overall progress:

targetLanding.signInPrompt: Sign in to save progress and sync across devices. The course works without sign-in too — progress stays in this browser.
targetLanding.previewBanner: Course in progress. {available} of 50 lessons available.
targetLanding.notAvailableHere: Not yet available in this language.
